params.name: Nibelungenlied
params.description:
On Feb 4, 1204 AD, a famous German Epic Poetry was published.
Nibelungenlied tells the story of Prince Siegfried's adventures where he killed dragons and obtained the treasures of the Nibelungs, including the magic sword Balmung and a mysterious magic helmet. This book focuses on major forces such as the Rhine, Burgundy, Huns, Brunhild, and how they're connected to the fate of the Nibelungs. The main storyline featured Siegfried's feats and then the revenge of his widow, which ended in traged …
